raw_source.title: [Remote] Yodayo诚聘 Senior ML Software Engineers 薪水 $120k-$140k USD
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
Yodayo is a multimedia social and creative hub for virtual YouTuber and anime fandom. We originally started off as a fan site for Hololive fans to share their oshi's clips and fan art.

## 薪资福利待遇
$120-$140K w 1-3% Stocks, Fully Remote, Health Insurance + Benefits

## 地点

- 工作地点：Remote
- 联系方式：Send email to [roblatt@yodayo.com](url), with subject line : **Name + Referral by OP Crypto**

## 工作性质
**What you will work on:**
- Create a world-class platform to help generate AI arts, chat with VTubers and create Manga
- Love Anime or interested in working with anime content
- Apply ML and engineering best practices to ship state-of-art generative AI features
- Research and implement appropriate ML algorithms and tools
- Select appropriate datasets and data representation methods
- Run machine learning tests and experiments
- Perform statistical analysis and fine-tuning using test results
- Train and retrain systems when necessary

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是

## 岗位要求、职责
**Qualifications**
You have:
- A degree/background in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field. A graduate degree is a nice to have but not required
- 3 or 4 years of experience in software development and demonstrated technical initiative
- Curiosity and a passion for LLM and Generative AI
- Experience building production level code
- A desire to be hands-on and help invent the future of AI
- The ability to work autonomously in the rapidly evolving world of AI

Stack:
We value general engineering skill and versatility over existing domain knowledge, but here’s a sample of what we currently use:
- Python, GO
- Tensorflow and/or PyTorch
- Docker, GCP, and Kubernetes
- Postgres, Cloudflare, Elasticsearch

## 工作环境
Remote
